# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

imports: []

resources:
  - name: app-network
    type: compute.v1.network
    properties:
      autoCreateSubnetworks: false

  - name: app-subnet
    type: compute.v1.subnetwork
    properties:
      region: us-central1
      network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
      ipCidrRange: 10.10.0.0/24

  - name: app-firewall-allow-http
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
      sourceRanges:
        - 0.0.0.0/0
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports:
            - "80"
            - "443"
      targetTags:
        - web

  - name: app-firewall-allow-health-check
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
      sourceRanges:
        - 130.211.0.0/22
        - 35.191.0.0/16
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports:
            - "80"
      targetTags:
        - web

  - name: app-firewall-allow-internal
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
      sourceRanges:
        - 10.10.0.0/24
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
        - IPProtocol: udp
        - IPProtocol: icmp

  - name: app-storage-bucket
    type: storage.v1.bucket
    properties:
      location: US
      storageClass: STANDARD
      versioning:
        enabled: true
      uniformBucketLevelAccess:
        enabled: true

  - name: app-sql-instance
    type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
    properties:
      region: us-central1
      databaseVersion: MYSQL_8_0
      settings:
        tier: db-custom-1-3840
        availabilityType: ZONAL
        dataDiskType: PD_SSD
        dataDiskSizeGb: 20
        ipConfiguration:
          ipv4Enabled: true
          authorizedNetworks: []
        backupConfiguration:
          enabled: true
          binaryLogEnabled: true

  - name: app-database
    type: sqladmin.v1beta4.database
    properties:
      instance: $(ref.app-sql-instance.name)
      name: appdb

  - name: app-db-user
    type: sqladmin.v1beta4.user
    properties:
      instance: $(ref.app-sql-instance.name)
      name: appuser
      password: change-me-secure-password

  - name: app-instance-template
    type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
    properties:
      properties:
        machineType: e2-medium
        tags:
          items:
            - web
        disks:
          - deviceName: boot
            type: PERSISTENT
            boot: true
            autoDelete: true
            initializeParams:
              sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-12
              diskSizeGb: 20
              diskType: pd-balanced
        networkInterfaces:
          - subnetwork: $(ref.app-subnet.selfLink)
            accessConfigs:
              - name: External NAT
                type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
        serviceAccounts:
          - email: default
            scopes:
              - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform
        metadata:
          items:
            - key: startup-script
              value: |
                #!/bin/bash
                apt-get update
                apt-get install -y nginx
                cat > /var/www/html/index.html <<'EOF'
                <html>
                <body>
                <h1>GCP MVP App Stack</h1>
                <p>Compute Engine behind HTTP Load Balancer</p>
                </body>
                </html>
                EOF
                systemctl enable nginx
                systemctl restart nginx

  - name: app-instance-group
    type: compute.v1.regionInstanceGroupManager
    properties:
      region: us-central1
      baseInstanceName: app
      instanceTemplate: $(ref.app-instance-template.selfLink)
      targetSize: 2
      distributionPolicy:
        zones:
          - zone: us-central1-a
          - zone: us-central1-b
      namedPorts:
        - name: http
          port: 80

  - name: app-health-check
    type: compute.v1.healthCheck
    properties:
      type: HTTP
      httpHealthCheck:
        port: 80
        requestPath: /
      checkIntervalSec: 5
      timeoutSec: 5
      healthyThreshold: 2
      unhealthyThreshold: 2

  - name: app-backend-service
    type: compute.v1.backendService
    properties:
      loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL
      protocol: HTTP
      portName: http
      timeoutSec: 30
      healthChecks:
        - $(ref.app-health-check.selfLink)
      backends:
        - group: $(ref.app-instance-group.instanceGroup)

  - name: app-url-map
    type: compute.v1.urlMap
    properties:
      defaultService: $(ref.app-backend-service.selfLink)

  - name: app-http-proxy
    type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
    properties:
      urlMap: $(ref.app-url-map.selfLink)

  - name: app-http-forwarding-rule
    type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
    properties:
      loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL
      IPProtocol: TCP
      portRange: "80"
      target: $(ref.app-http-proxy.selfLink)

outputs:
  - name: bucketName
    value: $(ref.app-storage-bucket.name)
  - name: sqlConnectionName
    value: $(ref.app-sql-instance.connectionName)
  - name: loadBalancerIp
    value: $(ref.app-http-forwarding-rule.IPAddress)
